theorem: electroweak tick-projection bridge for the local/global hierarchy resonance
allowed_inputs: OPH local pixel fixed point P_star
source D10 alpha_U(P_star) interval and forward transmutation law
forbidden_calibrations: measured weak scale v as an input
measured W, Z, Higgs, or top mass as an input
measured G or Planck area as an input
rounded N_CRC display as a high-precision bridge certificate

m_rep.role: global repair-tick round count on the OPH product branch

tick_exponent_denominator_48.role: denominator of the per-tick screen-radius exponent -1/(2*m_rep)
tick_exponent_denominator_48.source_theorem: global repair-tick theorem with derived round count

projection_target_factor_4_in_4P.role: the integer factor in the OPH resonance target Pi_EW(P_star,N_CRC^EW)=beta_EW*P_star=4P_star
projection_target_factor_4_in_4P.scope_note: The resonance target 4P_star=beta_EW*P_star is the OPH local/global EW resonance condition. The EW-refined global-capacity contraction certificate supplies its source-side realization.

projection_target_denominator_12_in_P_ov.role: denominator in t_tr = (P_star/12) * log(N_CRC/pi) and v/E_cell = (N_CRC/pi)^(-P_star/12), inherited from the projection ratio
projection_target_denominator_12_in_P_ov.source_theorem: algebraic consequence of D10 (beta_EW=4) and the global repair-tick + representation-to-spectrum theorems (m_rep=24)

derivation_chain.premise: ratio of step-1 and step-2 log-quantities

uses: P_star (local pixel fixed point from R_P)
derivation_chain.scope_note: This identifies the OPH local/global EW resonance target: a single global tick per electroweak channel per local pixel-area unit. The integers come from D10 (beta_EW) and R_P (P_star). The product target is the resonance condition used by this bridge certificate; a deeper geometric derivation of that product target belongs to a separate strengthening theorem.

derivation_chain.conclusion: N_CRC^EW(P_star) = pi*exp[6*pi/(P_star*alpha_U(P_star))] is the unique source-side fixed point, with B_EW(P_star,N_CRC^EW)=0

derivation_chain.premise: substitution of step 6 into step 1 and step 2

acceptance_criteria_status.factor_12_source: 12 = 2*m_rep/beta_EW = 48/4, from the global repair-tick + representation-to-spectrum theorems (m_rep=24) and D10 (beta_EW=4)
acceptance_criteria_status.compatibility_note: v/E_cell=exp[-2*pi/(beta_EW*alpha_U(P))] is the D10 forward transmutation law consumed as the local input.
acceptance_criteria_status.resonance_target_scope: The equality Pi_EW(P_star,N_CRC^EW)=4*P_star is the OPH local/global EW resonance condition. Each factor is corpus-derived (4=beta_EW from D10; P_star from R_P pixel closure), and the target's source-side realization is the bridge fixed point N_CRC^EW supplied by the EW-refined global-capacity contraction certificate. The product target is scoped to this OPH resonance condition; no measured datum supplies it.

claim_boundary.closed_here: unique projection map Pi_EW(P,N), explicit derivation chain from D10 transmutation and the global repair tick, machine-readable origin of every integer factor (4, 12, 24, 48), exact bridge residual B_EW=0, and exact bridge target N_EW(P_star)
claim_boundary.source_certificate_required: The issue-344 exact global capacity certificate supplies B_EW(P_star,N_CRC^EW)=0 for the bridge-refined capacity object.
closed_elsewhere: beta_EW=N_c+1=4 from the D10 forward transmutation certificate
m_rep=24 from the representation-to-spectrum round-count certificate (R_m_rep_24_certificate.json)
exact source-side capacity N_CRC^EW from the EW-refined global-capacity certificate (R_EW_global_capacity_certificate.json)
umbrella local/global hierarchy resonance from the resonance closeout certificate (R_local_global_hierarchy_resonance_closeout_335.json)
claim_boundary.rounded_display: 3.31e122 is a capacity-scale label and fails the exact bridge diagnostic.
claim_boundary.scope: Closed as an exact source-side EW tick-projection bridge for the EW-refined capacity N_CRC^EW. Under the OPH resonance target Pi_EW=4P, the bridge fixed point N_CRC^EW=pi*exp[6*pi/(P_star*alpha_U(P_star))] gives t_tr=(P_star/12)*log(N_CRC^EW/pi) and v/E_cell=(N_CRC^EW/pi)^(-P_star/12)=|g_*'|^(4P_star). The rounded 3.31e122 cosmological capacity display remains a diagnostic label. A deeper geometric derivation of the product target 4P_star belongs to a separate strengthening theorem.
